title: Product Owner
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: As a Product Owner in Montpellier, you define the product vision and manage the backlog to maximise the value delivered to users. You work closely with development teams and stakeholders.
mission.1: Définir et porter la vision produit
mission.2: Rédiger et prioriser les user stories et le backlog
mission.3: Facilitate Agile ceremonies (sprint planning, review, retrospective)
mission.4: Être l'interface entre les équipes métier et techniques
mission.5: Valider les livrables et assurer la recette
mission.6: Mesurer la valeur délivrée et les KPIs produit
mission.7: Conduire le changement auprès des parties prenantes
profile.1: Bac+4/5 en informatique, gestion ou école de commerce
profile.2: 3 à 7 years of experience in tant que PO ou Business Analyst
profile.3: Certification Scrum Product Owner (CSPO) is a plus
profile.4: Proficiency in JIRA, Confluence et des outils Agile
